query:
SELECT 
  p.enrichmentBlockedReason,
  COUNT(*) AS count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sr.sr_count BETWEEN 1 AND 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_1_2_send_ready
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT cp.projectId, SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sr_count
  FROM contactProjects cp
  JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId AND c.rejectionReason IS NULL AND c.crmOrphan = 0
  GROUP BY cp.projectId
) sr ON sr.projectId = p.id
WHERE p.priority = 'hot' AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
GROUP BY p.enrichmentBlockedReason
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 10;
